message:
🐛 Use double-rAF for tile redraw to avoid jitter (#139)

Replace setTimeout(50ms) with double requestAnimationFrame for terminal
refresh after tile mounting. First rAF lets browser complete layout,
second rAF syncs the redraw with the next paint cycle — eliminates any
visible blank-then-content flash.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
